name: UserTesting Human Insight Platform API
what_it_does: UserTesting human insight platform REST API for UX researchers and product teams to create and manage usability tests, access video session recordings, retrieve AI-powered insight highlights, and automate participant recruitment across diverse consumer and professional panels. Enables AI agents to manage test plan creation and configuration for usability research automation, handle participant recruitment and demographic targeting for research panel automation, access video session recording and transcription for research documentation automation, retrieve AI-powered sentiment and highlight extraction for insight synthesis automation, manage test result organization and sharing for research collaboration automation, handle prototype and URL test setup for product evaluation automation, access click map and interaction heatmap data for UX analytics automation, retrieve screener question management for participant qualification automation, manage research project and folder organization for research portfolio automation, and integrate UserTesting with Jira, Trello, Slack, and product management tools for end-to-end user research workflow.
use_cases: Running usability tests from UX research automation agents
Recruiting research participants from panel management agents
Extracting video insights from research synthesis agents
Managing research repositories from insight organization agents
not_for: Survey-based quantitative research (use SurveyMonkey or Qualtrics for surveys)
Continuous user behavior analytics (use FullStory or Hotjar for session replay)
A/B testing (use Optimizely or LaunchDarkly for experimentation)
best_when: A UX research or product team wanting AI agents to automate usability test creation, participant recruitment, video insight extraction, and research sharing through UserTesting's 1.5M+ panel human insight platform.
avoid_when: VIDEO PROCESSING LATENCY FOR AUTOMATED INSIGHT EXTRACTION: UserTesting video session processing (transcription, AI highlights) occurs asynchronously after test completion; automated insight extraction must poll for processing completion before accessing video analysis; automated immediate insight retrieval after test completion returns incomplete data for in-process video. PARTICIPANT PANEL ACCESS REQUIRES ENTERPRISE PLAN: UserTesting panel access for automated participant recruitment requires enterprise plan; self-recruited participants (bring your own) available on lower plans but reduces automation value; automated research panel access at scale requires enterprise contract negotiation. TEST CREATION WIZARD vs API PARITY: UserTesting's full test creation wizard offers more options than API; some advanced test configurations (branching logic, advanced screeners) may require manual UI configuration rather than API; automated test creation must verify API coverage for required test complexity before committing to API-based research workflow.

auth.notes: UserTesting uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for integrations. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2007 by Dave Garr and Darrell Benatar. Acquired by Thoma Bravo in 2021 (merged with UserZoom). Products: Usability testing, video sessions, AI insights, participant panel, prototype testing. Integrations: Jira, Trello, Slack, Figma, InVision. GDPR. SOC2. 1.5M+ panel participants. Competes with Maze, UserZoom, and Lookback for user research platforms.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — demo-based enterprise sales
pricing.paid_tiers: Essentials, Advanced, Ultimate tiers; custom enterprise pricing per seat; annual contract
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Thoma Bravo owned. Enterprise pricing. Annual contract. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; test and session queries throttled; video processing async; webhooks for test completion and insight events

known_agent_gotchas: VIDEO SESSION PROCESSING STATUS POLLING: UserTesting video sessions require processing after completion (transcription, AI highlights); automated insight pipeline must poll session status for 'completed' before accessing analysis data; automated insight extraction without status check creates empty analysis for in-process sessions

TEST PLAN TEMPLATE vs CUSTOM TEST CONFIGURATION: UserTesting supports test plan templates (pre-built research flows) and custom tests; automated test creation using template IDs must verify template availability on account plan; automated custom test creation requiring template features unavailable on account creates incomplete test configuration

PARTICIPANT CREDIT CONSUMPTION FOR AUTOMATED RESEARCH: UserTesting panel recruitment consumes participant credits; automated research at scale must track credit balance before launching tests; automated test launch without credit check creates test failure when credit balance is insufficient for recruited participants

SCREENER QUESTION LOGIC FOR PARTICIPANT QUALIFICATION: UserTesting screener questions with branching logic (show question if...) may have limited API configuration compared to UI wizard; automated screener setup must verify API support for required branching logic; automated screener without branching creates unqualified participant pool for specialized research

INSIGHT CLIP TIMESTAMP vs VIDEO TIME OFFSET: UserTesting AI insight clips reference timestamps within session video; automated insight extraction must understand timestamp format and video offset; automated insight aggregation using raw timestamps without normalization creates misaligned clip references across different session lengths
agent_readiness.security_notes: User research. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Research session, participant, and video data.

security_score_components.security_notes: User research. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Session, participant, and video data.
